sourceRef: tip:When a benefit runs out mid-term

slides.headline: Stay Ahead of Yellow Ribbon Benefits
slides.body: Understand when Yellow Ribbon benefits might run out mid-term and how to prepare.

slides.headline: Know the Timeline
slides.body: Understand the timeline for when Yellow Ribbon benefits can expire.

slides.headline: Review Student Agreement
slides.body: Students must sign a Yellow Ribbon agreement before benefits can expire.

slides.headline: Check Eligibility
slides.body: Ensure students remain eligible for Yellow Ribbon benefits.

slides.headline: Communicate Early
slides.body: Inform students early about potential benefit changes.

slides.headline: Document and Track
slides.body: Maintain records of benefit agreements and student progress.
Learn more about staying ahead of benefit changes. Link in bio.
slides.headline: Read the full post

outline.caption: Stay ahead of benefit changes by understanding when Yellow Ribbon benefits might run out mid-term. Learn how to prepare and communicate early with students.

rubricBreakdown.critique: The 'Document and Track' slide could benefit from a more concise takeaway to ensure it stands out more clearly.
